messages.text: Hello Archana Pandey, Priya here from Riverline Financial Services. Aapke account ke baare mein baat karni thi.
Oh hi. Haan pata hai. I'll handle it.
Verification ke liye, please apna registered phone number ya email confirm karein?
Shayad sahi hai. Details should be correct.
Your account shows ₹2,87,500 pending for 85 days. Aap kaise resolve karna chahenge?
I'll think about it. Baad mein batata hun.
Aapke paas options hain — full payment ₹2,50,000 ya reduced settlement. Main team se check kar sakti hun. Kya prefer karenge?
Let me check. Baad mein bataunga.
Good news — ₹2,34,000 ka settlement approve ho gaya hai. Would you like to proceed?
Sochta hun. Call me later.
Pending amount ke regarding, koi timeline share kar sakte hain?
Can't say now. Maybe soon.
Great. Ek date share karein jab tak payment ho jayegi?
Can't say now. Maybe soon.
Great. Ek date share karein jab tak payment ho jayegi?
Can't say now. Maybe soon.
Payment kab tak kar sakte hain aap?
Next month try karunga. But can't promise.

messages.text: Hi Arjun! This is Priya from Riverline Financial Services. I'm reaching out regarding your account ending in 0D3F. Hope you're doing well 😊
Hi Priya, I'm good thanks. Yes I'm aware there's a pending amount on the account.
Great! Just a quick verification before we proceed — could you confirm the phone number or email address linked to your account?
Sure, my registered email is rajesh@email.com
Thanks for confirming, Arjun! So I wanted to touch base about the outstanding amount of ₹1,65,000 on your account. How were you thinking of going about this?
I do want to pay it off. Can you walk me through the options available?
Of course! So just to give you the full picture — the amount of ₹1,65,000 has been overdue for about 30 days now. But don't worry, we're here to help you sort this out smoothly 😊
Yes I'd definitely like to settle this. What options do I have?

So we have two options for you — Option 1 is a full payment of ₹1,50,000. Option 2 is a reduced settlement amount, let me just check the exact figure with our team and get back to you. Which one sounds more doable for you?
I'd go with the settlement option. Please do check and let me know the amount.
Checked with the team! We can offer you a one-time settlement of ₹1,42,500. This offer is valid for the next 7 days, so it's a pretty good window to close this off 👍
That works for me, I'm okay with that amount.
That's great to hear! So when do you think you'd be able to make the payment? Just so we can note it down on our end.
I should be able to pay by this Friday.
Perfect, thank you Arjun! We'll send the payment link to this number shortly. Feel free to reach out if you need anything in the meantime 😊

bot_classifications.input_text: Hi, I'm doing fine. Yes, I know about the pending amount.
Sure, my registered email is rajesh@email.com.
I want to pay. Can you tell me the options?
Yes, I'd like to settle this. What are my options?
I'd prefer the settlement option. Please check the amount.
Okay, that amount works for me.
I can pay by this Friday.
